normalize

result.documentation:
To match the sentencepiece implementation 100%, we must handle a very strange edge-case.
For some reason, the "Fullwidth Tilde" character (\uFF5E) should not be converted to the standard Tilde character (\u007E).
However, NFKC normalization does do this conversion. As a result, we split the string on the Fullwidth Tilde character,
perform NFKC normalization on each substring, and then join them back together with the Fullwidth Tilde character.

result.documentation:
The NllbTokenizer class is used to tokenize text for NLLB ("No Language Left Behind") models.

No Language Left Behind (NLLB) is a first-of-its-kind, AI breakthrough project
that open-sources models capable of delivering high-quality translations directly
between any pair of 200+ languages — including low-resource languages like Asturian,
Luganda, Urdu and more. It aims to help people communicate with anyone, anywhere,
regardless of their language preferences. For more information, check out their
[paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2207.04672).

For a list of supported languages (along with their language codes),
@see {@link https://github.com/facebookresearch/flores/blob/main/flores200/README.md#languages-in-flores-200}
result.name: NllbTokenizer

result.signature:
const WHISPER_TO_LANGUAGE_CODE_MAPPING = new Map([
    ...WHISPER_LANGUAGES.map(([k, v]) => [v, k]),
    ...[
        ["burmese", "my"],
        ["valencian", "ca"],
        ["flemish", "nl"],
        ["haitian", "ht"],
        ["letzeburgesch", "lb"],
        ["pushto", "ps"],
        ["panjabi", "pa"],
        ["moldavian", "ro"],
        ["moldovan", "ro"],
        ["sinhalese", "si"],
        ["castilian", "es"],
    ]
]);

exactly the same way.

rawResponse.instructions:
You are an assistant that solves benchmark tasks using only the available operations.
Tasks may include question answering, retrieval, extraction, analysis, or code-related tasks.
Use the available functions or tools to gather the information needed to complete the task.
Guidelines:
- Use only information obtained from the available operations.
- If the available information is insufficient, say so.
- Be concise and precise.
- Do not make assumptions or use external knowledge.

tools.description: List visible repository files and metadata for a RepoQA workspace.
tools.name: list_files

tools.description: List code symbols and metadata for a RepoQA workspace. Optional filters: path and kind. kind='function' searches callable code, including methods; exact parser kinds such as 'method', 'class', and other kinds present in parsed.json may also be used.
tools.name: list_symbols

tools.description: Return one RepoQA symbol, including generated visible code.
tools.name: get_symbol

tools.description: Read one generated visible file from a RepoQA workspace.
tools.name: read_file

result.documentation:
Since non-maximum suppression is performed for exporting, we need to
process each image separately. For more information, see:
https://github.com/huggingface/optimum/blob/e3b7efb1257c011db907ef40ab340e795cc5684c/optimum/exporters/onnx/model_configs.py#L1028-L1032
